actions.title: AI says local options are limited
actions.reason: AI described the business negatively for "dentist available for customers in Palo Alto, CA".
actions.evidence: LittleBytes is a well-regarded dentist in Palo Alto, CA.
actions.solution: Add a Availability Or Scheduling Page proof block: services offered, who it serves, and 2-3 Menlo Park examples.
developerTasks: Update the Availability Or Scheduling Page with a concise section that addresses: LittleBytes is a well-regarded dentist in Palo Alto, CA.

actions.title: Strengthen top-recommendation proof
actions.reason: Best/top prompts need stronger proof signals like reviews, awards, and service-area clarity.
actions.evidence: 67% mention rate on top recommendation prompts.
actions.solution: Add one concise proof section with ratings, reviews, and credentials.
developerTasks: Add concise proof blocks for ratings, review count, and primary differentiators.

actions.title: Make availability and next steps clear
actions.reason: AI answers need clear booking, hours, or contact details before recommending the business.
actions.solution: Make hours, scheduling, and next steps easy to verify.
developerTasks: Make scheduling, hours, and contact details easy to crawl.

actions.title: Improve local-area coverage
actions.reason: Local discovery prompts should verify neighborhoods, nearby cities, and service radius.
actions.evidence: 78% mention rate on local discovery prompts.
actions.solution: Add a crawlable service-area section for nearby cities and neighborhoods.
developerTasks: Add location/service-area sections with nearby neighborhoods and cities served.
